title: BackAI Assistant for Sellers (beta version) - Information about AI and data
bodyHtml:
Back Market provides, in your Back Office, a conversational assistant based on generative artificial intelligence (beta service). Its purpose is to help you find answers and guide you to the Seller Support Center and applicable documentation.

 

Purposes

We process data related to your exchanges with the assistant in order to:

 

  • Answer your questions and direct you to relevant resources (Seller Support Center, Seller Terms and Conditions, Quality charter)

  • Assess and improve response quality (e.g., analysis, usage statistics, identification of uncovered topics, etc.) and improve our help articles and support content.

 

How it works and its limitations (generative AI)  

Responses are generated automatically and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or not suited to certain situations.

 

The assistant does not replace the Seller Support Center or human assistance when needed. If in doubt, please contact our seller support service team.

 

This service does not provide personalized legal, financial, or professional advice. If in doubt, refer to the applicable contractual documents and/or contact our seller support service team or the appropriate professional advisor.

 

Data processed

Depending on how you use the service, processed data may include:

 

  • Your user identifier (or seller account identifier) and certain session-related technical information

  • The content of your messages and the generated responses

  • Metadata associated with the conversation (e.g., date/time, category, quality indicators, etc.)

 

Important: Please do not provide personal or sensitive data (including customer personal data), or information relating to third parties.

 

Retention

Conversations (questions and answers) linked to your user identifier are retained for up to 12 months maximum, then deleted or anonymized, unless a legal
